Event Description/ Problem Statement: HIGH SPILLINGS ON THE RETURN SIDE OF TRAVELLING GRATE (TG).
Root Cause: SHOOTING UP OF PH 2 ZONE TEMP DURING START UP.
Actions: In view of the criticality & severity of its impact on profitability, the option of importing it from the OEM should  be considered.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: TG MD-4 Stopped Working Due to Motor Coil Burning.
Root Cause:
As Per The Process need Motor Speed is Increased From 100% to 130% in VFD. 
The Installed Gear Box Might Not be Permissive to Run at Increased Speed, Which Might be a Reason of High Axial Jerk Which Ultimately Affected the Performance of The Gear Box.
Due to Degradation of Performance of The Gear Box, All The Loads Came on to the Motor Which Might Damage the Motor Bearings & Ultimately Resulting in Motor Coil Burning.
Due to All the Above Phenomenon TG Feed Stopped Hence Production Loss.
Other 3 Main Drive units are Having Similar Type of Abnormalities Which are Kept Under Observation.
Actions:
1. As the TG is Running Condition, So The Motor & Gear Box Units are Can Not be Dismantled for Checking, So Further Checking will be Done While Opportunity Shutdown Only.

2. Motor Replacement Will be Done During This Opportunity Only.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: ABNORMAL SOUND  FROM THE DISC FEEDER GEARBOX.
Root Cause: Oil distributer outlet line toward the output bearing of gearbox found jam.
Actions: Proper arrangement  for inspection of lubrication to be provided. Gearbox with pinion replacement and new oil top up.
Remarks: Gauge provided in front of visual inspection of lubrication , Cover of girth gear cut in three piece for proper inspection of gears during preventive.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: SHEARING OF  CONNECTING  LINK  PIN  OF  DOUBLE  CONE  DRIVE.

Actions: Operation  of the pneumatic cylinder  to be  slowed  down

Actions: Ash feeding  chute  (PGP#5 side)  to be modified as suggested

Event Description/ Problem Statement: GRATE  RING  BREAKDOWN
Root Cause: MISMATCHED GRATE RING SEGMENTS AND USE OF UNDER SIZE BOLTS.
Actions: Grate ring assembly should always be replaced as a set. A set of grating to be assembled outside and kept in ready to use condition. M24 bolt grade 10.9 to be used strictly in assembling the grate rings. Its segments should be marked for identification. It should be dismantled and then assembled back inside reactor  matching markings.  This practice should be followed.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: CONTINUOUS  SPILLAGES  FROM  ASH CONVEYOR  BC # 3.
Root Cause: INCORRECT  POSITIONING OF  DRIVE PULLEY.
Actions: 500 mm secondary scraper to be  arranged  /  indented.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: CONTINUOUS  SPILLAGES  FROM  ASH CONVEYOR  BC # 4.

Actions: 500 /650 mm primary and secondary scrapers to be  arranged  /  indented.
Remarks: Indent raised for 650 mm primary scraper. Indent no.: I124508-010 Dated: 08/05/2024

Event Description/ Problem Statement: WATER LEAKAGE FROM THE REACTOR SHELL DUE TO DEVELOPMENT OF CRACKS IN THE WELD JOINT.
Root Cause: SOFTENER  NOT  BEING  OPERATED  IN LINE  WITH THE  OEM  GUIDELINES.
Actions: Brine  dozing and   rinsing  process  as explained (refer page- 7 of RCA ) to be strictly followed to dispose  scale forming salts, separated in softener  through drain. Presently, it is not drained out but taken back into the system.  This is the root cause of scale formation in all PGP units.

Remarks: Gravity take up counter weight reduced.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: COMPRESSOR #2  AIR END  ASSEMBLY  GOT SEIZED.

Display shall also include available stock of items required for replacement. This shall  be updated on the first  day of every month.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: TURBO GENERATOR(TG) OF CAPTIVE POWER PLANT (CPP) TRIPPED.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: EXPLOSION IN FURNACE-3A

Event Description/ Problem Statement: HIGH  FURNACE  HOLDING  TIME  FOR SEQUENCE  MATCHING.

FURNACE  HOLDING   FOR  SEQUENCE   MATCHING.
FURNACE  CHARGING  PRACTICES.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: TRIPPING OF  INDUCTION FURNACE   DUE  TO  HIGH COOLING WATER TEMP.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: FURNACE  COIL  PUNCTURE.
Root Cause:

2. BLOCKAGE BUT RISE IN WATER TEMP COULD NOT BE SENSED DUE TO INCORRECT LOCATION OF COOLING WATER  TEMP SENSOR.
Actions: The ball valve assembly along with the connected nipples is to be replaced. Both end nipples shall be of brass MOC and the ball valve shall have a provision for inserting a temperature sensor at the inlet end.

Event Description/ Problem Statement: ID FAN DRAFT VARIATION IN  WHRBs
Root Cause: it is conclusive that the behaviour of both the ID fans is similar and if any of the fan is developing a higher draft with the same RPM then it could be because of higher pressure drop in the system, mainly in the ducting where possibility of dust accumulation is higher or if the gas generation itself is lower due to whatever reason.
